features.title: What We Build
features.subtitle: End-to-end automation systems powered by software development, tailored to how your business actually works.

chatbots.title: AI Chatbots & Virtual Assistants
chatbots.desc: Your business doesn't sleep, and neither should your support. We build intelligent conversational agents that handle customer inquiries, qualify inbound leads, book meetings, and escalate complex issues to your team, all without human intervention. Trained on your data, integrated with your CRM, and available 24/7 across web, WhatsApp, and social channels.

crm.title: CRM & Sales Automation
crm.desc: Stop losing deals to slow follow-ups. We build automated sales pipelines that capture every lead, score them based on behavior and fit, trigger personalized nurture sequences, and alert your closers the moment a prospect is ready to buy. From first touch to signed contract, every step tracked, every action automated.

email.title: Email & SMS Sequences
email.desc: One-size-fits-all blasts don't convert. We design behavior-driven messaging flows that adapt to what each contact does, opens, clicks, downloads, purchases, or goes silent. The right message, on the right channel, at the right time. Fully automated, continuously optimized, and integrated with your existing tools.

data.title: Data Pipelines & Reporting
data.desc: Raw data is useless if nobody sees it. We build automated pipelines that pull data from every corner of your stack, CRMs, payment platforms, ad accounts, spreadsheets, clean it, transform it, and push it into live dashboards your team can actually use. No more Monday morning report scrambles. No more decisions based on gut feeling.

leads.title: Lead Generation & Scoring
leads.desc: Finding leads is easy. Finding the right leads is the hard part. We build multi-channel prospecting systems that combine outbound outreach, inbound capture, and AI-powered scoring to surface the opportunities most likely to close. Your sales team stops chasing dead ends and starts focusing on the top 20% that drive 80% of revenue.

internal.title: Internal Workflow Automation
internal.desc: Every company has dozens of repetitive internal processes that drain time, onboarding new hires, routing approvals, updating spreadsheets, sending status reports. We connect your HR tools, project management platforms, and communication channels into unified workflows that handle the busywork automatically. Your team gets their hours back.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Automation
ecommerce.desc: Scaling an online store means scaling operations, and that breaks fast without automation. We build systems that sync inventory across platforms, route orders to the right warehouse, trigger fulfillment notifications, handle returns, and update your accounting, all in real time. Whether you're on Shopify, Amazon, WooCommerce, or all three.

api.title: Custom API Integrations
api.desc: Your tools don't talk to each other? We fix that. If it has an API, we can connect it, CRMs, ERPs, payment gateways, legacy systems, government portals, anything. We build custom integrations that sync data bidirectionally, handle edge cases gracefully, and don't break when one system updates. No middleware bloat, no manual exports.

web.title: Website Design & Development
web.desc: Your website is your first impression, and your hardest-working salesperson. We build high-performance sites that load fast, look sharp, and convert visitors into leads. Fully integrated with your automation ecosystem so every form submission, chat interaction, and page visit feeds directly into your CRM and triggers the right follow-up.

allinone.title: All in One
allinone.desc: Why manage ten systems when you can have one? The All-in-One package connects every automation we offer into a single unified workflow built around your business. Lead generation feeds into your CRM. Your CRM triggers email sequences. Sequences drive bookings. Bookings update your dashboard. Everything talks to everything, and you don't lift a finger. Less manual work, fewer bottlenecks, and an operation that runs like clockwork.

results.title: Our Work
results.subtitle: Real results from real projects, plus examples of what we can build for you.

finance.title: Finance Automation
finance.challenge: A global logistics company's finance team was manually sifting through thousands of emails daily to match payables received by email against records in their internal system. The process was repetitive, error-prone, and consumed around 12 hours of the team's day, leading to burnout, mistakes, and missed deadlines.
finance.solution: A custom automation that captures all payables received via email and all payables created in their internal system, storing both in dedicated PostgreSQL databases. The system automatically compares both datasets and outputs a categorized SharePoint list showing: full matches, partial matches, records only found in the system, and records only found in emails. We also built a compliance dashboard giving leadership real-time visibility into the finance team's performance and processing speed.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Order Engine
ecommerce.challenge: A growing online retailer was manually processing orders across three platforms, leading to delays, overselling, and returns.
ecommerce.solution: A custom-built pipeline syncing Shopify, Amazon, and warehouse inventory in real time, with automated order routing and fulfillment notifications.

leadQual.title: AI Lead Qualification System
leadQual.challenge: A B2B consultancy spent hours manually sorting inbound leads, with sales reps wasting time on low-fit prospects.
leadQual.solution: An AI scoring engine connected to their CRM that auto-qualifies leads based on behavior, company data, and engagement, routing hot leads to closers instantly.
leadQual.metric3: Sales team focused on top 20% of leads

opsHub.title: Internal Operations Hub
opsHub.challenge: A 50-person company managed onboarding, time-off requests, and project handoffs across email, spreadsheets, and Slack. Nothing was connected.
opsHub.solution: A unified automation layer linking HR tools, Slack, and project management via custom API integrations, with an AI assistant handling routine employee questions.

cta.title: Ready to Automate?
cta.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute call and we'll map out exactly how automation can transform your business.

footer.desc: Next generation tooling for modern infrastructure.

booking.title: Discovery Call
booking.desc: 30-minute video call with the Sand Cloud team. We'll cover:
booking.agenda1: Needs analysis, to understand your business and goals
booking.agenda2: Process audit, to map your current workflow and find opportunities
booking.agenda3: Suggested next steps, a clear action plan tailored to you
